summary: This cluster focuses on the taxonomy and systematics of the freshwater algal class Conjugatophyceae (Zygnematophyceae), with a particular emphasis on the genera *Mougeotia*, *Mougeotiopsis*, and *Transeauina*. The research synthesizes historical nomenclature and classification changes, documenting the redefinition of the class and the evolutionary relationships among its orders and species. Key findings include a revised account of species diversity and distribution, supported by data from AlgaeBase, which highlights the global freshwater ecological scope of this group. The work provides a foundational taxonomic framework for understanding the phylogenetic position and biodiversity of conjugating green algae.
